overall.description: A third-person game engine scene depicting a female character walking steadily along a vast white salt flat or beach beside calm turquoise water. The minimalist environment features an expansive clear sky and a distant landmass on the horizon, with game UI controls visible at the bottom of the screen.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline of a white salt flat beside calm water, moving toward a distant landmass

entered.detail: calm turquoise sea water stretching to the horizon on the left side
vast expanse of white crystalline salt flat terrain underfoot
distant landmass or mountain range visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a vast, empty white salt flat bordering calm turquoise water under a clear blue sky. The open coastal landscape stretches uninterrupted to the horizon where a distant landmass remains visible throughout. The environment is completely devoid of vegetation, structures, or other entities, creating a serene, minimalist atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a minimalist coastal expanse that maintains a serene and unchanging atmosphere. It begins with a female character walking steadily along a vast, empty white salt flat that borders calm turquoise water. As she progresses, the camera tracks her movement through the open landscape under a clear blue sky, emphasizing the uninterrupted stretch of the terrain. The scene remains focused on this stark contrast of white ground and blue water before finally extending toward a distant landmass that lingers on the horizon.
